ab: Kavivila’ paluntan ca sipulan haip diqanin, madia’ sala ca sinkanal is sipulan a paluntanun.
ch: 今天是學校的運動會，學校舉辦了許多競賽。
en: Today was the school's sports day, and the school organized many competitions.

ab: Maiza ca pasibutbut, katundaqmali’, malilia, iungi’ ciin manaq buculkaka.
ch: 有拔河、足球、跑步、跳舞和射箭。
en: There were tug of war, soccer, running, dancing, and archery.
I participated in the running competition.

ab: Laplaq azak tu malilia tudiip, milu’lu’ ca qaa’, madia’ sala ca tiquc.
ch: 當我跑步的時候，我跌倒了，膝蓋流了很多血。
en: When I was running, I fell down, and my knees were bleeding.
But I stood up and continued running forward.

ab: Pandiipin azak a mu’amin ca bunun manahip sala.
ch: 我到終點時所有人都很開心。
en: Everyone was happy when I reached the finish line.

ab: Qaltu nii’ tu lavai’, uutu mantan azak manahip sala, maupa’i saunaqtungan zaku ca paluntan dii.
ch: 雖然沒有獲得第一名，但我很高興，因為我完成了比賽。
en: Although I didn't get first place, I'm glad because I completed the race.
